rulings.Case Title: DAWN M THOMPSON VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 27, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANTS BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY, BANKERS INSURANCE GROUP, BANKERS FINANCIAL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Continued to February 17, 2011. Court entertains reply and reply evidence. Plaintiff may file a supplemental opposition up to 5 pages. The supplemental opposition is due February 10, 2011 and plaintiff should lodge a courtesy copy with Department 302. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: WAIKEAN GOH et al VS. SANDRA YANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 27, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT SANDRA YANG'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions. Defendant's motion to compel further discovery responses is denied as to Form Interrogatories 2.12, 2.13 and 12.1. Defendant's motion granted as to the remaining Form Interrogatories. Defendant's request for sanctions granted. Plaintiff's counsel to pay $1200.00 attorneys fees and cost to defense counsel. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 27, 2011, line 4. rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, January 27, 2011, line 4.
